name: Steve Chabot
subject: Pro-life help needed
body:
No Images? Click here https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-jturlyz-kujkulhluu-o/

Friend,

I don't normally ask for much, but today, I have a critical ask -- I need your urgent support and contribution. Here's why:

Infanticide-supporting Democratic groups have placed me on their list of top targets for 2020 -- which means that they are planning to dump millions of dollars into Ohio, geared right at taking me out of Congress.

The very Democrats who are targeting me are the ones trying to bring infanticide, late-term abortions, and Planned Parenthood en masse to our great nation. They know that I'll never abandon my pro-life principles, so for them to achieve their pro-abortion agenda in Congress, they'll need to take me out in the process.

That's why I'm reaching out -- because to help me counteract what these radical, pro-abortion Democrats are preparing to throw at me tomorrow, I need to raise critical campaign funds today.

For the sake of the unborn, will you support me and my grassroots campaign with a contribution? You can donate here. [https://secure.campaignsolutions.com/stevechabot/donation1/?InitiativeKey=LDIJUAD2FVUN]

DONATE $10 TODAY [https://secure.campaignsolutions.com/stevechabot/donation1/?InitiativeKey=LDIJUAD2FVUN] DONATE $25 TODAY [https://secure.campaignsolutions.com/stevechabot/donation1/?InitiativeKey=LDIJUAD2FVUN] DONATE $100 TODAY [https://secure.campaignsolutions.com/stevechabot/donation1/?InitiativeKey=LDIJUAD2FVUN] DONATE $250 TODAY [https://secure.campaignsolutions.com/stevechabot/donation1/?InitiativeKey=LDIJUAD2FVUN] DONATE $1,000 TODAY [https://secure.campaignsolutions.com/stevechabot/donation1/?InitiativeKey=LDIJUAD2FVUN] DONATE OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.campaignsolutions.com/stevechabot/donation1/?InitiativeKey=LDIJUAD2FVUN]

Thank you in advance for your contribution.

Steve

2300 Montana Ave, Suite 306, Cincinnati, OH 45211 You are receiving this email because of your connection to our cause. If you receive this email in error, please use the unsubscribe link below and remove yourself from future mailings. Like https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-fb-jturlyz-kujkulhluu-b/ Tweet https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-tw-jturlyz-kujkulhluu-n/ Forward http://stevechabotforcongress.forwardtomyfriend.com/r-kujkulhluu-961825B2-jturlyz-l-p Preferences https://stevechabotforcongress.updatemyprofile.com/r-jturlyz-961825B2-kujkulhluu-x | Unsubscribe https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-u-jturlyz-kujkulhluu-m/

subject: [1] need to know where you stand

action to stand up for election reform!

As we look forward to the challenges ahead, we must keep our
grassroots energy high.

We want to make sure we’re focusing on the issues that are

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: Today, I celebrate the birthday of the Girl Scouts of America
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
| | On this day in 1912, the Girl Scouts of America was officially launched in Savannah, Georgia with a meeting of just 18 girls.

Now, 107 years later, the Girl Scouts have engaged and inspired generations of young women and empowered millions to serve their communities.

My daughters and I have been lucky enough to be a small part of that rich history. For the past five years, I have served as a Girl Scout Leader for my daughter's troop. _My daughter, and some of our favorite Girl Scout cookies!_ In that time, I have gotten to know so many bright and talented young women; to learn with and from them, and to use the tools and lessons of the Girl Scouts to instill within these future leaders a fundamental belief in the power of service, the value of character, and the importance of community.

I am honored to be a part of this organization, and on its 107th anniversary, I would like to thank the women I have worked alongside, the families I have grown close to, and most importantly, the girls I have had the privilege of guiding as a Girl Scout Leader.

Because as storied as this organization's past is, it's always been focused on the future; the Scouts I have been fortunate enough to work with over the past five years represent the entrepreneurs, scholars, innovators and leaders who will one day guide us well into the next 107 years.

And if these girls are any indication, we are in great hands.

_-Abigail Spanberger_

_Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat, former CIA officer, and representative for Virginia 's 7th Congressional District. She believes in leadership that flows from our shared American values of integrity, responsibility, and decency, and she wants to work to move this country forward together. To learn more, please visit [AbigailSpanberger.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/jYD_4M42FFCcXuFIHOf3Q9LSrEb8ASp4dqSNCp78_1s=/mjC9sKYCDo7PBjfWw1amxPqKi8Crszf6y3zbE327vc8=)_
| Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
---
Spanberger for Congress
PO Box 3121
Glen Allen VA 23058 United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/jYD_4M42FFCcXuFIHOf3Q9LSrEb8ASp4dqSNCp78_1s=/yCn9WRc4aQuPvgvrNpkO5u4FZXvqo_jZTCO5ZW-sRKM=).

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: President Trump’s 2020 Budget Seeks More Border Wall Funding, Work Requirements for Welfare
body:
"President Donald Trump’s fiscal 2020 budget proposal would eliminate the federal deficit in 15 years." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3ec8c7fdfc&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **President Trump’s 2020 Budget Seeks More Border Wall Funding, Work Requirements for Welfare**

“President Donald Trump’s fiscal 2020 budget proposal would eliminate the federal deficit in 15 years, add new work requirements for welfare recipients, and fund additional construction of a border wall,” Fred Lucas reports for _The Daily Signal_.

“We have more reforms than any other president’s budget in history, but, look, what has happened for far too long is that Congress has blamed mandatory spending and then increased discretionary spending, which they have a vote on every single year by large degrees,” White House Office of Management and Budget Acting Director Russ Vought said.

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a16b3ddf5d&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| In an interview with _[Breitbart News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=23d4fccea4&e=3ee4985eea)_ yesterday, President Trump said he does not want immigrants coming to the United States to be dependent on welfare programs. “We have a problem, because we have politicians that are not strong, or they have bad intentions, or they want to get votes, because they think if they come in they’re going to vote Democrat, you know, for the most part,” the President explained.
---
|
---
| “More than 2,000 people in Immigration and Customs Enforcement custody are being quarantined amid an outbreak of mumps and other diseases,” Geneva Sands, Michelle Lou, and Susan Scutti report for [CNN](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=eadfc200f0&e=3ee4985eea). “The numbers of immigrants in custody with a contagious diseases has spiked in the past year. For the previous two years, the agency has not encountered a single case of mumps among its detainees.”
---
|
---
| The _[Boston Herald](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c640eadbd6&e=3ee4985eea)_ editorial board writes that Democrats are giving anti-Semitism safe harbor in their party. “It is remarkable that we find ourselves in a situation where the new faces of the Democrats in Congress speak freely in extremist terms and the rest of the party’s power structure is afraid to tamp it down in any real way. We must call on elected leaders to condemn hateful rhetoric rather than attempt to curry favor with a freshman congressman from the Bronx.”
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3460165af8&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=565c3fd661&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=c61c1dedaf)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

We must call on elected leaders to condemn hateful rhetoric rather than attempt to curry favor with a freshman congressman from the Bronx.” | | | | | | The White House 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111

name: Tom O'Halleran
subject: I've got news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress
body:
The Super PAC for House Republicans just sent a frightening memo planning their "map back" to win the House again in 2020 -- and they put our district at the top of the list!
Tom O'Halleran is running for Congress in Arizona's 1st district, a critical race to getting Congress back on track. Click here to donate to Tom's campaign and help him put Arizona families first.
[](http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/m/1d632399/1a8421e1/1981b75c7/5adae7ce/683765783/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/1903-clf-to?refcode=190312-email&recurring=true")
---
Friend, I've got bad news. **The Super PAC for House Republicans just sent a frightening memo planning their "map back" to win the House again in 2020 -- and they put our district at the top of the list!** This is a serious threat. And it shows just how much dark money we're up against this cycle. [**That 's why we're rushing to fill a $5,000 rapid response fund today. Please donate $10, $25, or as much as you can right now to prepare for the tough fight ahead! **](http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/m/1d632399/1a8421e1/1981b75c7/5adae7ce/683765783/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/1903-clf-to?refcode=190312-email&recurring=true") | ****[CONTRIBUTE](http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/m/1d632399/1a8421e1/1981b75c7/5adae7ce/683765783/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/1903-clf-to?refcode=190312-email&recurring=true")****
---

These DC insiders think they can buy our seat. They even referred to our district as "Trump Country" and said we're "favorable terrain for Republicans." That's not what I see.

[**Prove them wrong: Donate $10 or $25 right now towards my $5,000 rapid response fund.**](http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/m/1d632399/1a8421e1/1981b75c7/5adae7ce/683765783/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/1903-clf-to?refcode=190312-email&recurring=true")

_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

name: Bernie Sanders
subject: I am asking you to add your name in support of my Medicare for All bill
body:
It is time to wage a moral and a political war for health care as a right in this country.
# [](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/8915?t=1&akid=717%2E150750%2E-ospmQ)

Sisters and Brothers -
It was not long ago that the idea of Medicare for All was dismissed and ridiculed by the corporate media and political establishment of this country.
Too radical, they said. Fringe. Crazy. Pie in the sky.
Well, they are not saying that anymore. Because today, not only do a strong majority of Americans believe health care should be a right in this country, but it is also a mainstream Democratic Party position.
That is because of you. It is because of our 2016 campaign. It is because of every petition signature, phone call, text message, social media post and donation you’ve made. You’ve led the way. It is not because of me. It is because of us. That is the political revolution.
But we still have a long way to go.
So when I re-introduce this bill in just a few weeks, I want every one of my colleagues in the Senate and every member of the House to know that we’re ready to fight harder than ever. Help me send that message:
**[Add your name as a Citizen Co-Sponsor of my Medicare-for-All, single-payer health care bill. When I introduce the legislation, I want it to be clear that the American people believe health care should be a right in this country.](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/em_mfa_cosponsor/?source=em190312-1-120-full&t=2&akid=717%2E150750%2E-ospmQ)**
For as far back as I can remember, I have always been a proponent of a national health care system. It just seemed eminently fair and right.
How can we call this a civilized society when some Americans have access to the best medical care in the world and others are unable to walk into a doctor’s office because they lack money?
How can we tolerate a situation where the children or parents of the rich get the medical attention they need in order to stay alive, while members of working-class families, who lack health insurance, have to die or needlessly suffer or go hopelessly into debt to get the care they need?
In my view, the function of a rational health care system in this country should be to provide quality care for everyone in a cost effective way, not to make health industry CEOs richer or drive up stock prices on Wall Street.
Now, the insurance companies may not like our legislation and the drug companies probably won’t either. They will try to make words like "NATIONAL HEALTH CARE" sound scary.
And it will not surprise you to learn that with hundreds of billions in profits at stake, the insurance companies, drug companies and others have already announced that they will spend huge amounts of money to protect their interests as they try to defeat our efforts.
But the truth is, for far too long they have been bribing the United States Congress, spending billions of dollars in lobbying and campaign contributions to make sure we maintain a dysfunctional, but profitable, approach to health care.
That may scare some of the other Democrats running for president, but it should not. They may have the money, but we have something more powerful:
We have the people.
And when I re-introduce my Medicare for All bill in the next few weeks, it is important we make it clear that we are ready to fight harder than ever for the fundamental belief that health care should be a right for every man, woman and child in this country.
Add your name:
**[Add your name as a Citizen Co-Sponsor of my Medicare-for-All, single-payer health care bill. When I introduce the legislation, I want it to be clear that the American people believe health care should be a right in this country.](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/em_mfa_cosponsor/?source=em190312-1-120-full&t=3&akid=717%2E150750%2E-ospmQ)**
Sisters and brothers: In this pivotal moment in American history, let us lead our country forward to guarantee health care as a right and not a privilege. This is a struggle whose time has come. This is a struggle not just about health care but about the heart and soul of our country, about what we stand for as a people.
It is a struggle we are winning. And it is a struggle we will win.
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders
* * *

**Add your name as a Citizen Co-Sponsor of Bernie Sanders’ Medicare-for-All, single-payer health care bill. Do it before he re-introduces the legislation in the Senate. Send an important message to Bernie’s colleagues about support for the idea that health care should be a right in this country.**

[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/em_mfa_cosponsor/?source=em190312-1-120-full&t=4&akid=717%2E150750%2E-ospmQ)

Paid for by Bernie 2020
PO BOX 391, Burlington, VT 05402
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to, [unsubscribe using this link](https://bernie.actionkit.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=5&akid=717%2E150750%2E-ospmQ). But we hope you'll stay, because emails are such an important part of how we organize and how we raise money. In fact, there is no single greater source for our campaign's fundraising than emails like this one. And that's important, because no one person, not even Bernie Sanders, can take on Trump and the billionaire class alone.

Before you go about the rest of your day, help power our fight against the billionaire class by [making a contribution today](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bernie-email-template?refcode=em-footer&t=6&refcode2=717_150750_-ospmQ&akid=717%2E150750%2E-ospmQ).

name: Team Fair Fight
subject: Democracy happens all year round in Georgia
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight Action
body:
When we step into the voting booth, each of our voices should carry equal power. |
---
[](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa6b8/34a064cc/755190a/7039ea8/3106845382/VEsH/ "https://www.fairfightgeorgia.com/")

| | | Friend - If we want to have a voice in our government - in how our government serves us - voting is the only mechanism that guarantees our voices will be heard. And when we fight to protect the right to vote, we fight for a nation where our democracy serves all of us. In Georgia, democracy happens all year round, not just one Tuesday in November. With elections from Clayton County to Gwinnett County to Cherokee County this month, we know our ability to make progress depends on our ability to access the ballot. In Gwinnett County, voters have the opportunity to make their voices heard on the critical question of expanding MARTA. [**Can you make a contribution today to support Fair Fight 's efforts to make sure every person in Gwinnett County can exercise their constitutional right to vote this month?**](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa6b8/34a064cc/755190a/7039ea9/3106845382/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fairfightga2018-2?refcode=IE031219MARTA") When we step into the voting booth, each of our voices should carry equal power. Our fight is about ensuring every vote counts, in every election, every year. A vote for MARTA in Gwinnett is a vote for more opportunities, connectivity, and accessible transit options. While some Georgians are moving forward and ahead, too many are blocked and denied mobility. Gwinnett County deserves world-class transit to deliver greater mobility for its booming population and to attract modern jobs and businesses. But this plan won't just help Gwinnettians get to work, go to school, and run errands, it will also help connect Georgians from every region of our state to what has quickly become one of the most diverse, vibrant counties in the state. Our ability to participate in government, to elect our leaders, and to improve our lives, is contingent upon our ability to access the ballot. Voting delivers all of our rights. More transit options means more opportunities, but change starts with all of us working together. [**Chip in to help us train more poll watchers and build the most robust voter protection infrastructure the county has ever seen so that every vote will be counted and every voice will be heard.**](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa6b8/34a064cc/755190a/7039ea9/3106845382/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fairfightga2018-2?refcode=IE031219MARTA") Early voting is already underway, and voters are casting their ballots today. Too much is at stake to let up. Onward,
Team Fair Fight
---
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa6b8/34a064cc/755190a/7039ea9/3106845382/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fairfightga2018-2?refcode=IE031219MARTA")**

|
---
[](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa6b8/34a064cc/755190a/7039eb6/3106845382/VEsD/ "https://www.facebook.com/stacey.abrams.77/") [](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa6b8/34a064cc/755190a/7039eb7/3106845382/VEsA/ "https://twitter.com/fairfightaction/") [](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa6b8/34a064cc/755190a/7039eb4/3106845382/VEsB/ "https://www.instagram.com/fairfightaction/")

1270 Caroline Street
Suite D120-447
Atlanta, GA 30307

(C)2018 Fair Fight Action, All rights reserved

Contributions to Fair Fight Action are not tax-deductible.
[Unsubscribe](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa6b8/34a064cc/755190a/7039eb5/3106845382/VEsO/ "https://secure.staceyabrams.com/unsubscribe")

| | Paid for by Fair Fight Action

name: Team Spanberger
subject: A SuperPAC is planning to target Abigail Spanberger’s important Central Virginia district. Can you help us with a small donation?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
| | Hi Peter,

We have an important update to share with you about the state of our race:

**The "Club For Growth" \-- a SuperPAC with ties to Washington insiders and Donald Trump -- is actively recruiting GOP candidates to run against Abigail Spanberger.** Take a look at what _Roll Call_ wrote about their plans: | _**" The club will be looking to win back seats, including Virginia's 7th District..."**

"'...we will invest more money there than any House race in the history of the club.' -Tom Schultz"_
[**-Roll Call**](https://act.myngp.com/el/PgpQkm1korVqOd9mrIpRBIn0ptYmC_W8f2O63_mzdP8=/o_BY0s8FozrGbwoXVLR3-lda5K30mBAxpzJgb0TKiP4=)
---
It's only been two months since Abigail's swearing in. And while she's focused on making good policy and serving the people of Central Virginia, she's already a top target.

**With the unfortunate reality about our political system and the constant campaigning that is driven by the oversized influence of money in politics, we knew this would be the case, so we need to be ready to fight back.**

This SuperPAC spent _millions_ in 2016 and in 2018 to influence voters, and they're poised now to spend even more in districts like ours in 2020. That means that we must keep our campaign's fundraising pace even in the off year. We need to raise money from grassroots supporters, like you, to make sure that Abigail wins her re-election against a forthcoming wave of attacks from SuperPACs and special interests.

[**Can we count on you to consider donating a few dollars to Abigail 's first competitive re-election campaign? We're aiming to raise $7,500 this week, purely from small dollar donations. >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/PgpQkm1korVqOd9mrIpRBIn0ptYmC_W8f2O63_mzdP8=/8rCEvebnxSaj0czFEViGpBDU0FSYuQ0RSBRV0OJYKw0=?refcode=em_fr_2019.03.12_b2_ts_nd&amount=25&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,1000,2800)

As we prepare for the deluge of ads and attacks we expect from this SuperPAC, Abigail remains committed to campaign finance and good governance reforms. **Last Friday, Abigail proudly cast her vote to pass the most important anti-corruption bill to come before Congress in decades.** It closes loopholes that allow lobbyists unfair influence, cuts down on the power of SuperPAC and special interest money in elections, and makes huge strides to put an end to gerrymandering districts on partisan lines.

We need more leaders like Abigail, who will fight for the best interest of her constituents, rather than deep-pocketed lobbyists and special interest groups. So, it's really important that we have the resources to keep her voice and leadership in Congress.

Thanks for your time today, team. We're thankful that we can count on you.

_-Team Spanberger_

Abigail Spanberger is running in her very first re-election in a pure toss-up Central Virginia district.

**Our next fundraising deadline is March 31st, and everything we raise will be made public. So we need to make a strong showing, or Washington insiders will be more determined than ever to beat Abigail in 2020.**

[**Will you contribute a few dollars to help Abigail win? >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/PgpQkm1korVqOd9mrIpRBIn0ptYmC_W8f2O63_mzdP8=/8rCEvebnxSaj0czFEViGpBDU0FSYuQ0RSBRV0OJYKw0=?refcode=em_fr_2019.03.12_b2_ts_nd&amount=25&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,1000,2800) | [CONTRIBUTE »](https://act.myngp.com/el/PgpQkm1korVqOd9mrIpRBIn0ptYmC_W8f2O63_mzdP8=/8rCEvebnxSaj0czFEViGpBDU0FSYuQ0RSBRV0OJYKw0=?refcode=em_fr_2019.03.12_b2_ts_nd&amount=25&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,1000,2800)
---

_Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat, former CIA officer, and representative for Virginia 's 7th Congressional District. She believes in leadership that flows from our shared American values of integrity, responsibility, and decency, and she wants to work to move this country forward together. To learn more, please visit [AbigailSpanberger.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/PgpQkm1korVqOd9mrIpRBIn0ptYmC_W8f2O63_mzdP8=/19Qc3_T5hoSa0jzE20Hp0Ee7oc8h0bTywmkqtSgMErc=)_

Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
---
Spanberger for Congress
PO Box 3121
Glen Allen VA 23058 United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/PgpQkm1korVqOd9mrIpRBIn0ptYmC_W8f2O63_mzdP8=/zuTnvUw0Jqubfqbha9889ewwc3m7x3xzaGGoJHteuqY=).

name: Kamala 2020
subject: FWD: I will be honest
body:
We wanted
to be sure you saw Kamala’s email from yesterday. In just a few weeks, we
will close the books on the first quarterly FEC deadline of our campaign,
and we need to be sure we reach our goal.

We’re rejecting all contributions from corporate PACs and federal
lobbyists -- so every gift helps. Pitch in
a donation to Kamala’s campaign today:

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-1903-mm-10-lift?firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&refcode=ema190312-full&amount=10&express_lane=true&t=1001&refcode2=3375_5755789_74Uqhc&akid=3375%2E5755789%2E74Uqhc ]Chip in $10 now

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-1903-mm-10-lift?firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&refcode=ema190312-full&amount=25&express_lane=true&t=1002&refcode2=3375_5755789_74Uqhc&akid=3375%2E5755789%2E74Uqhc ]Chip in $25 now

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-1903-mm-10-lift?firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&refcode=ema190312-full&amount=50&express_lane=true&t=1003&refcode2=3375_5755789_74Uqhc&akid=3375%2E5755789%2E74Uqhc ]Chip in $50 now

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-1903-mm-10-lift?firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&refcode=ema190312-full&amount=100&express_lane=true&t=1004&refcode2=3375_5755789_74Uqhc&akid=3375%2E5755789%2E74Uqhc ]Chip in $100 now

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-1903-mm-10-lift?firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&refcode=ema190312-full&amount=250&express_lane=true&t=1005&refcode2=3375_5755789_74Uqhc&akid=3375%2E5755789%2E74Uqhc ]Chip in $250 now

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-1903-mm-10-lift?firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&refcode=ema190312-full&t=1006&refcode2=3375_5755789_74Uqhc&akid=3375%2E5755789%2E74Uqhc ]Another Amount

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

Original message from Kamala Harris, March 11, 2019

In a little over two weeks, we will close the books on the first FEC
filing deadline of our campaign. Once we release our fundraising numbers,
our opponents -- both those running in the Democratic primary and Trump’s
team -- will dissect our report to get a sense of how strong our campaign
is.

I will be honest: at the
end of this email, I am going to ask you to make
a contribution to
power our campaign for president. I want you to know why it’s so
important, and what difference your contribution will make.

The money we raise can’t capture the powerful conversations about the
future of our country I’ve had with people on the campaign trail. And
fundraising can’t measure the passion of our grassroots activists and
volunteers who are fired up and ready to get to work -- to do more -- to
win this campaign.

But our fundraising does have direct impacts on the choices our campaign
makes right now. It helps us make big investments in our organization that
will grow our movement. And it helps us respond to dishonest attacks.

Our campaign finance system is stacked against everyday people --
corporations and dark-money groups are able to spend as much as they want
to sway our democracy. Let’s be clear: this is wrong -- but it is what we
are up against.

But from day one, I made a commitment to you: our campaign will reject all
contributions from corporate PACs and federal lobbyists -- instead,
putting our campaign in the hands of the people.

We are already facing attacks from Donald Trump’s allies -- including the
NRA -- and it will only get tougher from here. There will be nasty attacks
and millions spent against us to stop our campaign. But I’ve been taking
on tough fights my entire life. I’m not afraid of them. Especially knowing
I have you in my corner.

So here is where I ask you: can you step up today with a contribution to
power our campaign for president?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-1903-mm-10-lift?firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&refcode=ema190312-full&amount=10&express_lane=true&t=1007&refcode2=3375_5755789_74Uqhc&akid=3375%2E5755789%2E74Uqhc ]Chip in $10 now

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-1903-mm-10-lift?firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&refcode=ema190312-full&amount=25&express_lane=true&t=1008&refcode2=3375_5755789_74Uqhc&akid=3375%2E5755789%2E74Uqhc ]Chip in $25 now

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-1903-mm-10-lift?firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&refcode=ema190312-full&amount=50&express_lane=true&t=1009&refcode2=3375_5755789_74Uqhc&akid=3375%2E5755789%2E74Uqhc ]Chip in $50 now

clean_body: We wanted to be sure you saw Kamala’s email from yesterday. In just a few weeks, we will close the books on the first quarterly FEC deadline of our campaign, and we need to be sure we reach our goal. We’re rejecting all contributions from corporate PACs and federal lobbyists -- so every gift helps. Pitch in a donation to Kamala’s campaign today: If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: [ ]Chip in $10 now [ ]Chip in $25 now [ ]Chip in $50 now [ ]Chip in $100 now [ ]Chip in $250 now [ ]Another Amount Original message from Kamala Harris, March 11, 2019 In a little over two weeks, we will close the books on the first FEC filing deadline of our campaign. Once we release our fundraising numbers, our opponents -- both those running in the Democratic primary and Trump’s team -- will dissect our report to get a sense of how strong our campaign is. I will be honest: at the end of this email, I am going to ask you to make a contribution to power our campaign for president. I want you to know why it’s so important, and what difference your contribution will make. The money we raise can’t capture the powerful conversations about the future of our country I’ve had with people on the campaign trail. And fundraising can’t measure the passion of our grassroots activists and volunteers who are fired up and ready to get to work -- to do more -- to win this campaign. But our fundraising does have direct impacts on the choices our campaign makes right now. It helps us make big investments in our organization that will grow our movement. And it helps us respond to dishonest attacks. Our campaign finance system is stacked against everyday people -- corporations and dark-money groups are able to spend as much as they want to sway our democracy. Let’s be clear: this is wrong -- but it is what we are up against. But from day one, I made a commitment to you: our campaign will reject all contributions from corporate PACs and federal lobbyists -- instead, putting our campaign in the hands of the people. We are already facing attacks from Donald Trump’s allies -- including the NRA -- and it will only get tougher from here. There will be nasty attacks and millions spent against us to stop our campaign. But I’ve been taking on tough fights my entire life. I’m not afraid of them. Especially knowing I have you in my corner. So here is where I ask you: can you step up today with a contribution to power our campaign for president? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: [ ]Chip in $10 now [ ]Chip in $25 now [ ]Chip in $50 now [ ]Chip in $100 now [ ]Chip in $250 now [ ]Another Amount At the end of March when we close out our first quarterly FEC report, I know we will be proud to share the growing number of grassroots contributors who are pitching in what they can to our campaign, whether it’s $5, $10, or $50. I hope your name will be there, too. Thank you for all that you’ve done -- and will do -- to power our movement. For The People, — Kamala Harris You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:

name: staff@maggiehassan.com
subject: could you prioritize this, please? (survey)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc2a5/2a380d31/3a1c5396/f102d2/752302309/VEsH/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc2a5/2a380d31/3a1c5396/f102d2/752302309/VEsE/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
Hi there,
Last week, the team sent along a survey to gather your input on key priorities and campaign objectives. You're one of Senator Hassan's most valued supporters, so your opinion is critical.
Our records indicate that you still haven't had a chance to respond and we're planning to show her the results tomorrow night. [**Could you please take the 5-question survey as soon as you can? It takes less than a minute.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc2a5/2a380d31/3a1c5396/f102d3/752302309/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/s/201903_PrioritiesSurvey?source=e20190312_Survey3_RO&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264")
Senator Hassan is committed to prioritizing your point of view in her agenda, so please make sure you fill out the survey ASAP.
Thanks so much,
Team Maggie
[Contribute](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc2a5/2a380d31/3a1c5396/f102dc/752302309/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX2dlbmVyYWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE5MDMxMl9TdXJ2ZXkzX1JPIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_general?refcode=e20190312_Survey3_RO&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
